creator: jpd@dsb.tudelft.nl
text:
esniper 2.17.1 barfs on ebay's latest antics and recommends to update to
2.18.1. This version is not in ports (yet).

Fix: 

Update Makefile to new version 2-18-1. Also remove files/patch-configure
as it is apparently no longer needed and will not apply.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/misc/esniper ; make install ; then run esniper with suitable
configuration and auction(s) or -file(s).
